news.t: Motley Fool Asset Management To Launch Series of New ETFs to Complete Core Portfolio Allocations
Motley Fool Asset Management Launches Two New Index-Based ETFs

holdings.infoBox: TMFX is an equity ETF with a total of 191 individual holdings. The top holdings are Astera Labs stock at 3.28%, Interactive Brokers Group at 2.17%, Reddit at 1.64%, Casey's General Stores at 1.60%, and MasTec at 1.52%.

overview.description: The Motley Fool Next Index ETF (TMFX) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Motley Fool Next index, a market-cap-weighted index of mid- and small-cap US companies recommended by Motley Fools analysts and newsletters, excluding the 100 largest securities in the pool. TMFX was launched on Dec 29, 2021 and is issued by The Motley Fool.

data.title: Motley Fool Asset Management Launches Two New Index-Based ETFs
data.text: ALEXANDRIA, Va.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Motley Fool Asset Management, an affiliate of The Motley Fool, LLC,* today is proud to announce the launch of two new ETFs: Fool Capital Efficiency 100 Index and Fool...
